testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric test centers worldwide. Online proctoring available for select windows.

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with full name and signature. Name must match ISM registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. Open-book NOT permitted. No notes or reference materials. All three CPSM exams must be passed within a 3-year window to earn the CPSM designation.
renewal_options: Earn 60 continuing education hours (CEHs) every 3 years and pay the recertification fee. CEHs can be earned through ISM-approved courses, conferences, seminars, teaching, and publications.

prerequisites.description: High school diploma or equivalent; no bachelor's degree required (unlike CPSM)

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between attempts. Full exam fee required for retake.

domains.name: Total Cost of Ownership and Value Creation

official_study_resources.notes: Official ISM study guides and learning system available for purchase on the ISM website
